parameters.query:
SELECT 
  id,
  customer_name,
  customer_email,
  product_category,
  order_status,
  order_amount,
  order_date,
  created_at,
  updated_at
FROM orders
WHERE created_at >= $1::timestamp
  AND created_at < $2::timestamp
ORDER BY created_at ASC

SELECT 
  id,
  customer_name,
  customer_email,
  product_category,
  order_status,
  order_amount,
  order_date,
  created_at,
  updated_at
FROM orders
WHERE updated_at >= $1::timestamp
  AND updated_at < $2::timestamp
  AND created_at < $1::timestamp
ORDER BY updated_at ASC

value.Details: ={{ 'New: ' + $('Calculate Daily Aggregates').first().json.new_records + ', Updated: ' + $('Calculate Daily Aggregates').first().json.updated_records + ', Revenue: $' + $('Calculate Daily Aggregates').first().json.total_revenue }}
